rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Package Support Framework (PSF) Advanced Installer Processes

rules.rule_text:
title: Package Support Framework (PSF) Advanced Installer Processes
id: 0c5dcf6c-9b6a-4411-a410-9b9b2caaef75
status: experimental
description: "Detects app package installation processes where legitimate software\
  \ is included \nin an MSIX package, but a malicious PowerShell script may execute\
  \ beforehand by \nemploying the Package Support Framework (PSF). In these cases,\
  \ the MSIX package \nincludes the malicious script, which is executed as specified\
  \ in an included \nconfig.json file. Part of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection\
  \ Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/installer-packages/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1546
- attack.t1546.016
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - \AI_STUBS\AiStubX64Elevated.exe
    - \AI_STUBS\AiStubX86Elevated.exe
    - \AI_STUBS\AiStubX64.exe
    - \AI_STUBS\AiStubX86.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
